display.purpose: Fraunces. Hero copy on home and storefront pages only.

headline.purpose: Fraunces. Section titles such as Featured artisans and Recent listings.

title.purpose: Fraunces. Product titles on detail pages and artisan names on storefront cards.

body.purpose: Geist. All running copy, capped at 65 to 75 characters per line.

label.purpose: Geist. Buttons, inputs, navigation, and form labels. Steps down to 12px for badges and captions.

shadows.name: hairline-ring
shadows.purpose: The only elevation cue in the system. Delineates raised app surfaces (cards, dialogs). It is a ring, not a drop shadow.

motion.name: ease-quart-out
motion.purpose: Exponential ease-out for the product image hover scale.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Default transition for button and input state changes.

motion.name: duration-image
motion.purpose: Product photo scaling to 103% on card hover.

motion.name: duration-overlay
motion.purpose: Dialog fade and zoom on open and close.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The default action. Deep Sea Navy fill; carries every primary CTA on the storefront.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; gap: 6px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: #1A2B3A; color: #FDFCF7; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(26, 43, 58, 0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #1A2B3A; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26, 43, 58, 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A quieter action. Oat fill, navy text; pairs beside a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; gap: 6px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: #EEE9DD; color: #1A2B3A; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #E4DECF; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #1A2B3A; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26, 43, 58, 0.5); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: The lightest action. Cream fill with a Shoreline Sand border; used for tertiary navigation like pagination.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; gap: 6px; border: 1px solid #E6DFD1; border-radius: 8px; background: #FDFCF7; color: #1A2B3A; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #EEE9DD; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #1A2B3A; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26, 43, 58, 0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Single-line field. Transparent fill, 1px Shoreline Sand stroke, navy focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 220px; height: 32px; padding: 4px 10px; border: 1px solid #E6DFD1; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #1A2B3A; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #52616F; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #1A2B3A; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26, 43, 58, 0.5); }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped status mark. Navy fill; labels order state. One per card at most.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #1A2B3A; color: #FDFCF7; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Limited Badge
components.description: The rare Heirloom Gold badge. Reserved for genuinely limited drops; never routine.
components.css: .ds-badge-limited { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #E9B244; color: #1A2B3A; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: The signature storefront component. Deliberately not a Card: a bare stack of photo, title, artisan, and price. The photo carries it. Image scales to 103% and the title shifts to vermilion on hover.
components.html:
Stoneware pour-over carafe

Maria Ceramics

₱1,250.00
components.css: .ds-product-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; width: 220px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-product-card__image { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; border-radius: 8px; background: #EEE9DD; overflow: hidden; } .ds-product-card__image svg { transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-product-card:hover .ds-product-card__image svg { transform: scale(1.03); } .ds-product-card__body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-product-card__title { margin: 0; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.4; color: #1A2B3A; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-product-card:hover .ds-product-card__title { color: #C8413C; } .ds-product-card__artisan { margin: 0; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #52616F; } .ds-product-card__price { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #C8413C; }

components.name: Price Tag
components.description: Price display. Vermilion, weight 500, with any compare-at value struck through in Driftwood.
components.css: .ds-price-tag { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #C8413C; } .ds-price-tag__compare { margin-left: 6px; font-weight: 400; color: #52616F; }

components.name: App Card
components.description: Dashboard and account surface. Shell White on a hairline navy ring, no drop shadow. Cards belong to the app, not the storefront.
components.html:
Shop settings

Update your storefront name, location, and banner.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; width: 240px; padding: 16px; border-radius: 11px; background: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(26, 43, 58, 0.1); } .ds-card__title { margin: 0; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; color: #1A2B3A; } .ds-card__desc { margin: 0; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; color: #52616F; }

narrative.overview: Balikha lays each artisan's work out as if on a craftsperson's workbench: warm, grounded, and close enough that you can almost see the hands behind it. The system is warm-toned and unhurried. It frames handmade objects the way a gallery frames an artist's work, but it never goes cold or white-cube about it. Paper warmth, not screen glare. The surface recedes so the craft can lead. Photography is the hero of every storefront screen; chrome is hairline-thin; type does its work through scale and through one well-earned switch into a serif, not through heavy weights or loud color. Color is restrained: a warm cream field, a deep navy that carries every action, and a single Philippine vermilion that appears only as a highlight. Motion is small and physical. This system explicitly rejects the marketplaces it is built against: it is not a big-box marketplace, not an Etsy-style craft feed, and not a loud DTC startup. Editorial, not retail: the product should feel browsed, not pushed.
keyCharacteristics: Warm and tactile. Cream field, soft 8px to 11px radii, a 1px press nudge.
Photo-forward. Storefront product imagery sits in bare containers, no card chrome competing with it.
Restrained color. Navy carries every action; vermilion is a highlight only; gold is rare.
Two fonts, used with intent. Geist for the interface, Fraunces for editorial moments.
Flat by default. Depth comes from a hairline ring, never a drop shadow.
Mobile-first. Every layout works at 375px, with 64px to 112px of vertical section rhythm.

rules.name: The Navy-Carries-the-Click Rule
rules.body: Every button and primary CTA is Deep Sea Navy. Vermilion never fills a button. The one exception is Deep Ember on a true destructive action.

rules.name: The Vermilion-Is-a-Highlight Rule
rules.body: Philippine Vermilion marks prices, links, and Sale or Limited badges. It is always type or a small mark, never a surface. If vermilion is filling a large area, it is being misused.

rules.name: The Gold-Is-Rare Rule
rules.body: Heirloom Gold appears only on genuinely limited drops and special moments. If it shows up on every screen it has lost its meaning.

rules.name: The Two-Weight Rule
rules.body: Geist runs at 400 for body and 500 for emphasis. Nothing heavier. No 600, no 700. Hierarchy comes from size and from switching to Fraunces, never from weight.

rules.name: The Serif-Is-Earned Rule
rules.body: Fraunces appears only on editorial moments: hero copy, section headlines, product titles on detail pages, artisan names, and long-form about prose. Everything else is Geist.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Separation comes from a 1px ring or a 1px Shoreline Sand border, never from a drop shadow. If a surface needs a shadow to read, the layout is wrong.

dos: Do carry every click on Deep Sea Navy (#1A2B3A). Buttons and primary CTAs are navy, always.
Do reserve Philippine Vermilion (#C8413C) for prices, links, and Sale or Limited badges. It is a highlight, never a fill.
Do switch to Fraunces only for editorial moments: hero copy, section headlines, product titles on detail pages, artisan names. Geist everywhere else.
Do keep surfaces flat. Separate them with the 1px navy 10 percent ring or a Shoreline Sand border, never a drop shadow.
Do let storefront product photos sit in bare containers. Use the cardless ProductCard pattern; photos are the heroes.
Do bump primary CTAs to at least 44px height on mobile. The default 32px control height is below a comfortable touch target.
Do cap body copy at 65 to 75 characters per line, and respect prefers-reduced-motion on every animation.
donts: Don't build the big-box marketplace: no cramped grids, no star-rating noise, no manufactured scarcity (only 2 left).
Don't build the Etsy-style craft feed: no discount banners, no badge-heavy cards, no infinite homogenous grid where every card screams equally.
Don't build the loud DTC startup: no gradient-soaked surfaces, no oversized type, no emoji, no popups, exit-intent modals, or countdown timers.
Don't fill a button with vermilion or any red except Deep Ember on a true destructive action.
Don't let Heirloom Gold appear beyond the occasional limited-drop moment. Ubiquity kills it.
Don't reach for font weight 600 or 700. Hierarchy is size plus Fraunces, not heaviness.
Don't use a colored side-stripe border, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism. The dialog scrim's backdrop-blur is the only blur in the system.
Don't wrap storefront products in shadowed cards or repeat identical icon-heading-text card grids.
